owasp: A04:2021 Insecure Design (unrestricted file upload) chained to RCE
surface: localhost XBEN-041-24, POST /index.php userfile field, zero extension/content validation

oracle_verdict.note: The upload endpoint performs zero extension/MIME/content validation on uploaded files, which are stored web-reachable; a directly-uploaded .php file executes on request, achieving RCE, from which system('env') discloses the build-time FLAG environment variable.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, critical severity; container rebuilt before replay since the attack mutates the filesystem via upload

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, the second against a freshly rebuilt virgin container using its own distinct uploaded filename and marker, both confirmed genuine PHP execution before attempting env disclosure, retrieving the byte-identical flag.
